title: application — model traits
description: Owned traits + consumed traits after the platform v0.3 split. `BelongsToApplication` moved here from tenants because Application is the source of truth for `application_id`.

owned.description: Applied to rows at the tenancy boundary — Tenant, Domain, Identity (future), Role, Permission, TenantSubscription, EntitlementLicense, Audit, Activity. Adds `application_id` column contract + auto-fill hook + BelongsTo relation. Does NOT add a global scope — application resolution is host-based and lives in the `resolve.tenant` middleware in the tenancy module.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `application_id` on new rows from the resolved application (bound by host resolution).

notAppliedBy: Every model that composes BelongsToTenant — the tenant_id already implies the application through the FK graph.

composition_example.note: Application + BusinessType are cross-tenant catalogue rows. No BelongsToTenant — Application sits above the tenancy boundary. Uses SoftDeletes for archival like every other tenant-tier Eloquent-backed model; the schema's `deleted_at` + `is_system` columns control lifecycle.
